title: Alberta Health Services calls wrongful dismissal suit by former CEO groundless
notes: Source for EVT-072. AHS statement of defence calls Mentzelopoulos wrongful dismissal suit 'groundless and vexatious.' AHS denies interference in her investigation. The suit alleges a government official ordered her to wind up her conflict-of-interest investigation and transfer files to Alberta Health. Related to the MHCare $70M Turkish medication contract.
